text:
Hey all. I'm building a database of local card/comic/TCG shops around the country that I can use as sources for future PSA Magazine stories.

So, what are your favorite local card shops? Shoot me a reply/DM.

If you're an LCS owner and want to be added, same thing. Thanks!

Tonight will be another fine example of how Trump is graded on the biggest of curves. Basically, if he doesn't say something wildly racist or drop his pants and run around screaming about pancakes, people will say he looked presidential. If he does those things, people will say it's just who he is.

Hello, new Bluesky followers!

This is the account of Coliseum of Comics, a Florida-based comic book and collectibles chain. We share store events and what's on sale (or soon to be), but quite a lot of our content is news items and information that we hope you'll find useful and/or entertaining.

FREE COMIC SPOTLIGHT: These Savage Shores #1 by @therightram.bsky.social & @artofsumit.bsky.social , courtesy of @thevaultcomics.bsky.social .⁠
⁠
Ancient evils lurk from ship to shore, and can join your Neon Ichiban collection for completely FREE!⁠
Check it out here: neonichiban.com/item/10516

This sharp selection of photos #autographed by #TedLange brings the charm of the Love Boat’s smooth‑talking bartender back to port, signed by the man who kept the Pacific Princess running on personality alone. eBay tinyurl.com/3fh7wdtv Amazon tinyurl.com/pyvjdeaa
#TedLange #authentic #beckett

Golden‑age glamour with real star power—these signed shots of #SophiaLoren bottle the charisma that made her the first actor to win an Oscar for a foreign‑language performance, each one a frame of pure cinematic royalty. eBay tinyurl.com/2p2sbdaa and Amazon tinyurl.com/4749z97f
#authentic #beckett

PSA10 gem alert 💎—a pristine Topps #tradingcard of #HonusWagner, the Flying Dutchman whose ultra‑scarce issues have smashed auction records for decades and still break wallets on sight. tinyurl.com/2hfnmwe9

Retro glamour with a signature edge—this 11x14 photo of #DitaVonTeese channels the queen of modern pin‑up at her most iconic, authenticated by @beckettcollect and dripping with the vintage allure she single‑handedly revived 💋📸 eBay tinyurl.com/msknwz89 and Amazon tinyurl.com/5n8t7jym

Our eBay and Amazon shelves are loaded with Beckett‑cert autos and PSA‑graded gems built to hold value through every market whiplash. Amazon chasers can punch in AAVLPCOX for 10% off before the prime pieces vanish. eBay tinyurl.com/39mcnwhp Amazon tinyurl.com/4wdfm4ea

Flawless flamethrower flex: #NolanRyan’s @Topps #tradingcard in gem‑mint #PSA10—cardboard royalty from the only pitcher with 7 no‑hitters and a strikeout total no one’s touched since. Holding this slab is basically gripping a live wire of baseball history. ⚾🔥 tinyurl.com/4857a9ux

Hazy lights, whispered lyrics, and that midnight ache—these rare signed shots of #CigarettesAfterSex frontman #GregGonzalez bottle the slow‑burn magic that pushed their dream‑pop lullabies from late‑night secrets to global cult devotion. eBay tinyurl.com/5an29a4j and Amazon tinyurl.com/4e4h4srn

#CGC #graded 9.8 #WonderWoman #157 #signed by #AdamHughes — a killer combo from the era when Hughes turned Diana into a cover‑art gold standard. eBay tinyurl.com/324f6v25 Amazon tinyurl.com/3w5tr4mr Collectors Comics tinyurl.com/3sb4kn68

Carved lines, cold air, and pure dominance—this signed shot of #JamieAnderson celebrates the slopestyle phenom who made Olympic history with back‑to‑back golds at Sochi and PyeongChang, redefining what style and control look like in the air. eBay tinyurl.com/mrxf5wtj and Amazon tinyurl.com/bdzz9346

#PSA vault energy 🏒 #SidneyCrosby rookies are climbing like the kid who hit 100 points as a teenager—true blue‑chip stock from a 3‑Cup, 2‑Hart icon who rewrote modern captaincy. #graded #tradingcards eBay tinyurl.com/mr3fzxts Amazon tinyurl.com/mrxbbh6b MySlabs tinyurl.com/yc8zaa3x

Soft light, sharp signature—this signed shot of #NicoleWilliamsEnglish captures the SI standout who’s turned runway presence and reality‑TV charisma into a full‑blown pop‑culture calling card, all backed by Beckett authentication. eBay tinyurl.com/yfrnzejf and Amazon tinyurl.com/5cvtv4ws

Iconic swing, gem‑mint glow: #WillieMays 1988 #PacificLegends #tradingcard in pristine #PSA10—one of just 12 on record. A razor‑sharp tribute to the Say Hey Kid, whose 660 homers and 12 Gold Gloves still define all‑around greatness. 🧢💎 tinyurl.com/yc4hzdz7

Keb’ Mo’s signature hits different when you’re holding a slice of the modern blues bloodline—the five‑time Grammy craftsman who helped pull acoustic roots back into the spotlight with that unmistakable warm‑grit tone. eBay tinyurl.com/3rkdwwxh and Amazon tinyurl.com/26h37mxp
#authentic #beckett

#MikeSchmidt’s @Topp #tradingcard just leveled up to #PSA10—razor corners, glassy gloss, and pure Cooperstown voltage. Philly’s power king mashed 548 homers and stacked 3 MVPs, and this slab feels like holding that dominance in permanent mint condition. #graded tinyurl.com/bdj4h93y

hi, i make beaded spiders & suncatchers & am super broke this month. can’t work full time, can’t find part time work..I petsit but that’s not gonna cover my bills this month. handmade stuff is here - palmstreet.app/invites/aloe...
i sell plants too, those are on ebay - linktr.ee/aloehoarder

My Aloe ‘DZ’ before it decided to try & rot last year. It’s hanging out in one of the prop pots in the greenhouse, but it’ll be awhile before it looks this nice again.

‘DZ’ is often sold mislabeled by some nurseries as zebrina ‘Dannyz’ (or ‘Christmas Carol’.) It is a Karen Zimmerman hybrid.

#aloe
